issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type, not just if Leader exists on board. Should use LeaderHasAnyType with types: ['FILM', 'Straw Hat Crew']

Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. 'Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active' means activating resting DON cards, which requires 'Rest' action (to flip them active) or a custom activation mechanic. GiveDon adds new DON cards. Should clarify intent: if activating existing resting DON, use Rest; if adding DON, GiveDon is closer but still imprecise.
